Contains OpenGL 1.X implementations.

    BufferTargetType

    OGLBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.getBuffer(BufferTargetType type)
    Gets the currently bound buffer for a binding target.
    protected OGLBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.getCurrentBufferState(BufferTargetType type)
    Gets the current buffer for a binding target.
    ByteBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapByteBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
    DoubleBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapDoubleBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
    FloatBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapFloatBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.

    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.

    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
    ShortBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapShortBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
    void
    OGL15Graphics.setBuffer(BufferTargetType type, OGLBuffer buffer)
    Binds a buffer to the current context.
    void
    OGL15Graphics.setBufferCapacity(BufferTargetType type, DataType dataType, CachingHint cachingHint, int elements)
    Sets the capacity of the current buffer (sends no data).
    void

    Sets the data of the current buffer.
    void

    Sets the data of the current buffer.

    Sets the data of the current buffer.

    Sets the data of the current buffer.
    void

    Sets the data of the current buffer.
    void
    OGL15Graphics.setBufferData(BufferTargetType type, CachingHint cachingHint, ShortBuffer data)
    Sets the data of the current buffer.
    void

    Sets a subsection of data to the current buffer.
    void

    OGL15Graphics.setCurrentBufferState(BufferTargetType type, OGLBuffer buffer)
    Sets the current texture for a binding target.
    boolean
    OGL15Graphics.unmapBuffer(BufferTargetType type)
    Unmaps a buffer after it has been mapped and manipulated/read by the calling client application.
    void
    OGL15Graphics.unsetBuffer(BufferTargetType type)
    Unbinds the current buffer from a target.
